muniCodeNote: CodePublishing.com returns 403 on direct chapter WebFetch; use web search or cached summaries.

buildingDept.name: Palos Verdes Estates Department of Building and Safety
buildingDept.address: 340 Palos Verdes Dr West, Palos Verdes Estates, CA 90274
buildingDept.counterHours: Monday–Thursday 8:00–10:00 AM walk-in; appointments via email
buildingDept.inspectionNote: Call ext 112 by 4:00 PM for next-day inspection (Mon–Thu only)

fhsz.note: March 2025 SFM update. Not city-wide — verify parcel-level designation.

keyLocalRequirements.name: PVHA Art Jury
keyLocalRequirements.description: Palos Verdes Homes Association Art Jury approval required for all exterior construction. Private review body (est. 1924), separate from city building permit. Fees $1,000–$15,000; adds 2–8+ weeks.
keyLocalRequirements.contact: PVHA, 3 Malaga Cove Plaza, Palos Verdes Estates, CA 90274

keyLocalRequirements.name: Underground Service Laterals
keyLocalRequirements.description: Ch. 15.12 local amendment requires all new electric, telephone, and community antenna laterals underground. Limited hardship exceptions.

solarAppPlus.essNote: ESS/BESS requires LACoFD fire review via EPIC-LA before SolarAPP+ submission
